title: 'This has got me worried': Iranians fear what comes next after US strike on Karaj bridge
summary_full: President Trump has warned Iran of strikes on bridges and electric power plants if its leaders do not agree to his terms to end the war.
summary_public: President Trump has warned Iran of strikes on bridges and electric power plants if its leaders do not agree to his terms to end the war.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump has warned Iran of strikes on bridges
